name: Flagship Reimagination
desc: A full reset of the digital flagship — brand, strategy, storefront, and build. For brands ready to redefine their commerce experience from the ground up.

name: Experience Revitalization
desc: A focused refresh of the core user journey without a full rebuild. For brands whose foundation is sound but whose experience is dated.

name: Architecture Migration
desc: Replatforming and re-architecting commerce stacks. For brands moving to Shopify Plus or restructuring their tech.

name: LTV Enhancement
desc: Compounding programs that grow customer value over time — subscription, loyalty, retention, returns, and operational margin.

name: Conversion Optimization
desc: A continuous program of testing, learning, and shipping improvements to the commerce experience.

name: Channel Expansion
desc: Extending the commerce model to new channels — retail, B2B, global markets, multi-brand portfolios.

name: Preventative Care
desc: The ongoing partnership layer — site care, data, fractional support. The connective tissue under every other program.
